project_ref.name: Grid connected electricity generation using natural gas by L

fields.description: Fuel-switching project that claims emissions reductions by replacing a higher-carbon fossil fuel (e.g. diesel, coal) with a lower-carbon alternative (e.g. natural gas). Additionality and permanence of avoided emissions are methodology-sensitive; this archetype is not a carbon removal.
fields.monitoring_approach: Fuel-consumption records and emission factors per IPCC 2006.
